name: plugin lifecycle: /uninstall-cleanup without --confirm yes is a dry-run preview (lists categories that would be removed without removing them)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/cache && touch .claude-tdd-pro/cache/x && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/uninstall-cleanup.sh" --category cache 2>out.txt && [ -d .claude-tdd-pro/cache ] && grep -E "would remove" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
